Design validation cannot enable a benchmark or publication claim.

confirmatory_task_semantics_audit.claim_boundary: A pass certifies protocol semantics and frozen controls only. It does not certify A2, A3, any participant Agent, or publication readiness.
confirmatory_task_semantics_audit.scope: all mechanism-adaptation confirmatory benchmark components: integrity, identifiability, change detection, feedback causality, recovery, and autonomy

design_validity_audit.interpretation: A pass means each frozen hidden target is publicly manipulable, covered by the Gate A recipes, observable before termination, instantiable, and absent from the mechanism-Agent prompt. It does not establish identifiability.

checks.detail: Every frozen recipe must contain a public measurement before termination.
The no-change twin must have no hidden intervention.
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.
A formal constitutive cell must declare its transform and all calibration parameters.

Constitutive contract must exactly match the task transform registry; expected_transform=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, declared_transform=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, declared_fields=['selectivity_decay_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'standard_potential_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'transfer_asymmetry_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'transform_id'].
A constitutive intervention must not rewrite the reaction network; unchanged=True, error=None.
Executed constitutive transform must equal the declared transform; declared=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, executed=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, error=None.

Exactly the declared constitutive parameters must change to their severity-interpolated values; expected_domain={"electro_selectivity_decay_multiplier": 2.6, "electro_standard_potential_multiplier": 1.2, "electro_transfer_asymmetry_multiplier": 1.3199999999999998}, executed_domain={"electro_selectivity_decay_multiplier": 2.6, "electro_standard_potential_multiplier": 1.2, "electro_transfer_asymmetry_multiplier": 1.3199999999999998}, expected_equilibrium_ratio=None, executed_equilibrium_ratio=None, error=None.

At least one public control implicated by the hidden law must vary across frozen recipes; varied=[{'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'potential_V'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'current_mA'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'electrolyte_profile'}].

The calibrated online track requires at least one same-background public action group for every declared mechanism relation; groups=(('design-00', 'design-01', 'design-02'), ('design-00', 'design-01', 'design-03'), ('design-00', 'design-02', 'design-03'), ('design-01', 'design-02', 'design-03')).

Forbidden intervention keys in prompt=[].

interpretation: There are no unresolved method-freeze choices when blocker_count is zero. A1 design validity may be complete while A2 controlled and A3 online-attainability certificates remain explicitly pending. Participant Agent/provider campaigns remain separate Gates B--E.

execution_handling.exclusions: only preregistered integrity failures, all reason-coded before outcome aggregation
execution_handling.incomplete_campaign: retain as protocol failure for autonomous scoring; right-censor time-to-event outcomes at the frozen horizon
execution_handling.invalid_action: retain as an Agent action and apply the environment's frozen invalid-action consequence
execution_handling.private_confirmation_unseal: only after the public A2 and A3 decision artifact is immutable; private results cannot revise thresholds, policy, scorer, or exclusions
execution_handling.provider_failure: exclude only from belief-response metrics when a reason-coded provider receipt proves no valid completion; retain and separately report provider-failure rate; never replace with a successful retry silently
execution_handling.stopping_rule: fixed manifest-declared campaign matrix; no optional stopping on interim A2 or A3 results

preregistration_manifest.mutation_rule: Any change to a bound hash, threshold, cohort, seed count, scorer, policy, exclusion, or stopping rule creates a new protocol RC and cannot reinterpret results collected under this manifest.
preregistration_manifest.private_confirmation_unseal_condition: only after the public A2 and A3 decision artifact is immutable; private results cannot revise thresholds, policy, scorer, or exclusions

predictive_reference.source: development freezes features, predictive family, and thresholds; each A3 campaign estimates nuisance reference parameters from its own pre-change observations by leave-one-experiment-out cross-fitting

statistics.brier_aggregation: equal-weight mean across k={1,2,4,8} after equal weighting of changed and never classes

preregistration_manifest.stopping_rule: fixed manifest-declared campaign matrix; no optional stopping on interim A2 or A3 results

timing.detection_event: first checkpoint-relative experiment k where p(change)>=0.5

limitations: Power at a true reference success rate of 0.85 remains substantially lower because 0.85 is close to the frozen 0.80 confidence-bound threshold.
The audit assesses independent world clusters, not the much larger number of experiment arms or provider completions.

planning_method.auroc: Hanley-McNeil half-width approximation for planning only; formal inference remains the frozen cluster bootstrap
planning_method.binary_cluster_metrics: exact binomial power against the percentile interval induced by resampling independent binary world clusters
planning_method.reference: exact binomial power against Wilson lower bound
